rw [iIndepFun_iff]
  intro I f hf
  rw [Bandit.measure, Measure.prod_apply (by fun_prop)]
  simp only [Measure.fst_measure_univ, one_mul]
  rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]
  simp only [rewardByCount]
  rw [Measure.infinitePi_apply (by fun_prop)]
  refine Finset.prod_congr rfl fun n _ ↦ ?_
  rw [Measure.infinitePi_apply (by fun_prop)]
  refine Finset.prod_congr rfl fun a _ ↦ ?_
  by_cases h : (a, n + 1) ∈ I
  · have : (⋂ p ∈ I, ⋂ (_ : p = (a, n + 1)),
        {ω : α → ℝ | (if p.2 = 0 then 0 else ω p.1) ∈ f p}) = {ω | ω a ∈ f (a, n + 1)} := by
      ext ω
      simp only [Set.mem_iInter, Set.mem_setOf_eq, h, ↓reduceIte, Nat.add_one_ne_zero,
        Prod.mk.injEq, true_implies]
      refine ⟨fun h' ↦ h' (a, n+1) h rfl rfl, fun h' p hp heq1 heq2 ↦ ?_⟩
      cases heq1; cases heq2; exact h'
    rw [this, Measure.eval_apply (by fun_prop)]
    simp
  · have : (⋂ p ∈ I, ⋂ (_ : p = (a, n + 1)),
        {ω : α → ℝ | (if p.2 = 0 then 0 else ω p.1) ∈ f p}) = Set.univ := by
      ext ω
      simp only [Set.mem_iInter, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_univ, iff_true]
      intro p hp heq1 heq2
      subst heq1 heq2
      contradiction
    rw [this, Measure.measure_univ]
    symm
    refine Finset.prod_eq_one fun p hp ↦ ?_
    by_contra h'
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Nat.add_one_ne_zero, ↓reduceIte,
      measure_univ, one_ne_zero] at h'
    rw [← h'] at h
    have : p = (a, n+1) := by
      ext;
      · have := Finset.mem_filter.1 (Finset.mem_filter.1 hp).2; simp at this; exact this.symm
      · have := Finset.mem_filter.1 hp; simp at this; rw [this.2, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
    subst this
    contradiction
